c.d: The number of active users or monthly visitors on the app, influencing potential buyer reach.
The fees charged by the app for listing or selling an item, impacting seller costs.
How user-friendly the app interface and listing process are, affecting seller convenience and speed.
Availability and flexibility of shipping methods like discounted labels, home pickup, or local meetups.
Range and specialties of item types supported for sale on the app.
Verification of buyer/seller identities and secure transaction mechanisms to reduce fraud and scams.
Methods and speed of payment to sellers after a transaction.
